description: A plain black-and-white documentary photograph with no graphic design, on-image text, seal, or border. It depicts an outdoor industrial pipe yard: a bearded male worker in a hard hat, safety glasses, and a high-visibility safety vest stands at the rear of a flatbed truck/trailer, guiding or rigging large coated steel pipes with a cable/rope; stacks of big-diameter pipe sit on the trailer and on the ground behind him, and an Alaska license plate ('YZE 834') is visible on the trailer. It is in black and white and is an undesigned work photo, not a designed meme. It accompanies the same DOL tweet that refers to skilled energy workers as 'Heroes.'
